title: hieracium gothicifrons
side_effects: Hieracium gothicifrons can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach pain, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Overconsumption of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory problems, in sensitive individuals. Additionally, Hieracium gothicifrons may interact with certain medications, including blood thinners and diabetes medications, thereby exacerbating pre-existing health conditions. Prolonged exposure to the plant's bioactive compounds may also cause liver and kidney damage in extreme cases.
